channel.title: centos8 on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in centos8 on IT notes

item.title: yumdownloader
item.description: To download rpms for using them in an offline environment, install first yumdownloader: yum install yum-utils Create a directory to store the rpm's: mkdir /tmp/rpms Download the rpms: yumdownloader --destdir=/tmp/rpms --resolve MariaDB-server galera-4 MariaDB-client MariaDB-shared MariaDB-backup MariaDB-common
